speaker: seller

args.message: Hey there! You've got great taste — this 2016 Tahoe LT is one of the cleanest full-size SUVs we've had on the lot in months. Only 142,000 miles, leather seats, Bose sound system, and that bulletproof 5.3L V8 that'll run forever. We just had it fully serviced and it's ready to go for your family adventures. I've got it priced at $24,900, which is a steal for what you're getting here!

text: Hey there! You've got great taste — this 2016 Tahoe LT is one of the cleanest full-size SUVs we've had on the lot in months. Only 142,000 miles, leather seats, Bose sound system, and that bulletproof 5.3L V8 that'll run forever. We just had it fully serviced and it's ready to go for your family adventures. I've got it priced at $24,900, which is a steal for what you're getting here!

speaker: buyer

args.message: That's good to hear. Has this Tahoe ever been in any accidents?

text: That's good to hear. Has this Tahoe ever been in any accidents?

speaker: seller

args.message: Great question — and I'm happy to tell you this one's clean as a whistle. No accidents on the Carfax, no frame damage, nothing like that. You can see the body lines are all straight, the gaps are even, and there's no overspray anywhere. This Tahoe lived a good life — probably a suburban family hauler based on the service history. That's exactly what you want to find in a used SUV like this. Want to take a closer look or maybe fire it up and take it for a spin?

speaker: buyer

args.reason: The asking price is significantly above my budget, and I'm not able to negotiate that much. Thanks for your time.
